summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 7×7 circulant matrix derived from c=[3, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 2]. Each diagonal color-coded (7-cycle of colors). ValueTracker shift_tr cyclically shifts the top row through 5 values; always_redraw rebuilds entire matrix + top-row banner. Right panel shows DFT eigenvalues (complex) computed via np.fft.fft — circulant is diagonalized by F.
